---
title: "functions_testing"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## crab_prep() testing

**pipeline:**

```{r}
# crab prep grabs data obj, original cols; user chosen attrib. are NULL 
penguins |>
  crab_prep()
```

```{r}
# user chosen cols are updated
penguins |>
  crab_prep() |>
  crab_cols(c("flipper_length_mm", "bill_length_mm"))
```

```{r}
# error messages left if cols don't exist
penguins |>
  crab_prep() |>
  crab_cols(c("flipper_length_mm", "Bill_length_mm"))
```

```{r}
# user chosen cols and params are updated
penguins |>
  crab_prep() |>
  crab_cols(c("flipper_length_mm", "bill_length_mm")) |>
  crab_params(min_k = 2, max_k = 5, num_subsamples = 10, cluster_method = "kmeans")
```

```{r}
# error messages left if required params arent listed
penguins |>
  crab_prep() |>
  crab_cols(c("flipper_length_mm", "bill_length_mm")) |>
  crab_params(min_k = 2, max_k = 5)
```

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## crab_bake() testing

**pipeline:**

```{r}
penguins |>
  crab_prep() |>
  crab_cols(c("flipper_length_mm", "bill_length_mm")) |>
  crab_params(min_k = 2, max_k = 5, num_subsamples = 10, cluster_method = "kmeans") |>
  crab_bake()
```

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## repeat_simulations() testing

**individual function:**

```{r}
# option 1
test1 <- repeat_simulations(min_k = 2, max_k = 5, num_subsamples = 10, 
                   num_runs = 2, variance = c(0.3, 0.4), cluster_method = "kmeans")
test1
```

**pipeline:**

```{r}
# option 2
crab_setup <- crab_prep(data = NULL) |>
              crab_sim_params(min_k = 2, max_k = 5, num_subsamples = 10, 
                              num_runs = 2, variance = c(0.3, 0.4), cluster_method = "kmeans") 
repeat_simulations(crab_setup)
```

```{r}
# option 3
crab_prep(data = NULL) |>
              crab_sim_params(min_k = 2, max_k = 5, num_subsamples = 10, 
                              num_runs = 2, variance = c(0.3, 0.4), cluster_method = "kmeans") |>
  repeat_simulations()
```
